title: Registration Form
thankYouDescription: Your data has been successfully submitted. We will contact you soon.

hotel.title: Hotel
hotel.description: Traditional accommodation with reception and services.
hotel.tooltip: Includes hotels, motels, and guesthouses with daily housekeeping.

hostel.title: Hostel
hostel.tooltip: Facilities with shared rooms (dormitories) and shared bathrooms.

apartment.title: Apartment
apartment.tooltip: Short-term rentals of entire apartments or houses without daily housekeeping.

campsite.title: Campsite
campsite.description: Outdoor accommodation for tents and caravans.
campsite.tooltip: Includes traditional campsites, glamping, and caravan pitches.
